arts.ttl: Maresca faces transfer threat as Liverpool pursue Chelsea 'UNTOUCHABLE'
arts.sum: Colwill, 22, has been linked with a move to Anfield for several years and Arne Slot’s side have rekindled their interest in the England international, according to TEAMtalk, as they look to sign a player capable of playing at centre-back and left-back. Liverpool reportedly remain interested in signing Chelsea defender Levi Colwill, although they are unlikely to complete a deal during the 2025 summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Champions League
arts.sum: Cody Gakpo will be a game time decision as Liverpool will likely field their strongest XI vs. PSG in the first leg of the Champions League round of 16.

arts.ttl: Barcelona, PSG Poised to Challenge Juventus for Arsenal Standout Nearing Free Agency
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have quality talent in their midfield, but one area they lack at this position is height. Fabian Ruiz is the tallest player at 6′ 2″ (1.89m), but behind him, it’s pretty thin regarding players near the Spaniard’s stature. Senny Mayulu is 6′ 0″ (1.83m), but there’s not much behind the 18-year-old. arts.ttl: The Four Liverpool Players That Need to Avoid a Yellow Card Against PSG
